steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content: The passage contrasts why tech firms cluster in Northern California (knowledge spillovers) with why tube manufacturers cluster (different reasons). That contrast signals the blank must mean something like "varying" or "differing across industries."

steps.title: Eliminate each wrong choice and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Test all four choices against that meaning:
  • Choice A — 'credible': means believable or trustworthy — the passage is about what varies across industries, not what is believable. ✗
  • Choice B — 'heterogeneous': means varied or differing in kind — captures exactly that the mix of factors differs across industries. ✓
  • Choice C — 'imperative': means urgently necessary — the passage never argues these factors are urgent. ✗
  • Choice D — 'decisive': means conclusive or final — describes strength of influence, not variation across industries. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
